economic_notes: Nation operating convenience store and gas bar (expansion in progress), VLT program, waste and water services. New health facility under construction managed by Oodanookatoh Inc. Gas bar and convenience store expansion underway with $4,911,175 invested. 6-unit CMHC Section 95 housing project under construction.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (not 2024). Six consolidated entities including VLT program, convenience store/gas bar, housing authority, and waste/water services. Large deferred revenue balance of $2,923,558 primarily from ISC Capital Investment and COVID-19 funding. Three major capital projects in progress: new health facility, gas bar/convenience store expansion, and CMHC Section 95 housing. ISC funding per confirmation was $21,866,445 but recognized amount after deferred revenue adjustments was $19,471,937. Net debt position of $16,030,790. No remuneration schedule included in provided statements. CMHC advances payable of $528,812 for Section 95 project not yet reflected in long-term debt. Community and Economic Development segment 'Other revenue' includes large internal allocations that net across segments.
